indicators.name: large drafting tables
indicators.rationale: Large drafting tables are not suitable for computer work as they lack a flat surface for a keyboard and monitor.

indicators.name: lack of flat personal work surface
indicators.rationale: No flat surface at sitting height for a keyboard and monitor is available.

indicators.name: no ergonomic seating
indicators.rationale: No chairs or stools are present for comfortable sitting while working.

indicators.name: ambient lighting
indicators.rationale: Ambient lighting does not provide task illumination for screen work.

indicators.name: open layout
indicators.rationale: Open layout with no walls or partitions allows distractions and noise to enter the space.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The large drafting tables lack a flat surface for a keyboard and monitor, and there is no ergonomic seating available. The open layout and ambient lighting do not support focused work. However, the presence of multiple drafting tables suggests some level of preparedness for computer work, albeit not optimally suited.
